tipRules.tip: KVD: Cold front makes pre-spawn fish swipe and slap at the Red Eye Shad instead of eating it. Triple grip hooks catch them foul-hooked in the back or dorsal — 'that's why you use triple grips.' Won a Classic doing exactly this.

knowledge.insight: KVD: Texas pre-spawn isn't just about Rayburn and Toledo Bend. Many other Texas lakes have big fish. Pre-spawn in Texas = follow ditches and drains leading to spawning flats.
